raw_text:
HEADER
Khaireddine Suibgui
El Ghazela, Ariana [suibguikhairi2021@gmail.com	 + 216 55470669](mailto:suibguikhairi2021@gmail.com)
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
As a Data Science engineer graduated from TEK-UP university, I have developed a solid foundation in my field to deliver actionable insights. I am passionate about using technology to achieve impactful solutions, and I am eager to apply my expertise in a professional environment to drive innovation and optimize performance.
EDUCATION
ENGINEERING DEGREE	TEK-UP University - Ariana , Data Science *2022 – 2025*
2022 – 2025
PREPARATORY CYCLE	FSM - Monastir , Maths - Physics *2018 – 2021*
2018 – 2021
BACCALAUREATE	Pioneer School of Kasserine - Kasserine , Mathemathics *2017*
2017
Experience
End of Studies Internship *Club Africain, Tunis | March - August 2025*
August 2025
- Designed and developed a web application for managing players’ personal and sports data, integrating an intelli- gent system to predict potential injuries and provide personalized training recommendations.
- Developed a speech synthesis system capable of transforming written text into audible speech using deep learning for the conversion model and big data for storage and processing.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
*Tools : * Angular | NodeJs | MongoDB | ExpressJs | Machine Learning | Git.
**SUMMER INTERNSHIP** *TEK-UP, Ariana | July – August 2024*
***Tools :*** Tensorflow | PyTorch | Apache Spark | NLTK | Git.
Programming Languages: Python | R | Matlab | SQL | JavaScript | Java | C | C++.
**Technologies:** MySQL | MongoDB | Cassandra | ML | DL | LLMs | Fine Tuning | Power BI | Scikit-learn | TensorFlow | Keras | PyTorch | Apache Spark | Apache Airflow | JAX | Hadoop | AWS | Git.
ACADEMIC PROJECTS
Comment Toxicity Detection *TEK-UP, Ariana | October 2024*
October 2024
- Develop a deep learning model to classify toxicity in user comments using TensorFlow and Keras. It involved NLP, vectorization and building a sequential model with LSTM layers to detect categories of toxicity.
***Tools :*** Tensorflow | Keras | LSTM | NLP | Git.
Heart Health *TEK-UP, Ariana | April 2024*
April 2024
- developed a project to analyze data on heart disease involving classification algorithms such as SVM and KNN and clustering like K-Means to predict the presence of heart disease.
***Tools :*** SVM | KNN | K-Means | Naive Bayes | Adaboost | Git.
Travel Booking *TEK-UP, Ariana | February 2024*
February 2024
- Developed a predictive system to address the high cost of travel bookings by creating a dynamic price prediction model with machine learning to predict booking prices and a dashboard interface using Power BI.
***Tools :*** SVM | KNN | K-Means | Microsoft Power BI | Git.
Tourism Analysis *TEK-UP, Ariana | December 2023*
December 2023
- developed a project by processing a complex database of tourist bookings using R. It included reading the database, manipulating the data, visualizing the data, Creating interactive dashboards and writing a report.
***Tools :*** R | R Markdown | Shiny | Tidyverse | Git.
LANGUAGES
**Arabic:** Native **English:** Fluent **French:** Fluent
markdown:
<!-- image -->

# Khaireddine Suibgui

<!-- image -->

<!-- image -->

<!-- image -->

<!-- image -->

<!-- image -->

El Ghazela, Ariana [suibguikhairi2021@gmail.com	 + 216 55470669](mailto:suibguikhairi2021@gmail.com)

### Profile

As a Data Science engineer graduated from TEK-UP university, I have developed a solid foundation in my field to deliver actionable insights. I am passionate about using technology to achieve impactful solutions, and I am eager to apply my expertise in a professional environment to drive innovation and optimize performance.

### Education

**ENGINEERING DEGREE	TEK-UP University - Ariana** , Data Science *2022 – 2025*

**PREPARATORY CYCLE	FSM - Monastir** , Maths - Physics *2018 – 2021*

**BACCALAUREATE	Pioneer School of Kasserine - Kasserine** , Mathemathics *2017*

Experience

**End of Studies Internship** *Club Africain, Tunis | March - August 2025*

- Designed and developed a web application for managing players’ personal and sports data, integrating an intelli- gent system to predict potential injuries and provide personalized training recommendations.

***Tools :*** Angular | NodeJs | MongoDB | ExpressJs | Machine Learning | Git.

**SUMMER INTERNSHIP** *TEK-UP, Ariana | July – August 2024*

- Developed a speech synthesis system capable of transforming written text into audible speech using deep learning for the conversion model and big data for storage and processing.

***Tools :*** Tensorflow | PyTorch | Apache Spark | NLTK | Git.

### Academic Projects

**Comment Toxicity Detection** *TEK-UP, Ariana | October 2024*

- Develop a deep learning model to classify toxicity in user comments using TensorFlow and Keras. It involved NLP, vectorization and building a sequential model with LSTM layers to detect categories of toxicity.

***Tools :*** Tensorflow | Keras | LSTM | NLP | Git.

**Heart Health** *TEK-UP, Ariana | April 2024*

- developed a project to analyze data on heart disease involving classification algorithms such as SVM and KNN and clustering like K-Means to predict the presence of heart disease.

***Tools :*** SVM | KNN | K-Means | Naive Bayes | Adaboost | Git.

**Travel Booking** *TEK-UP, Ariana | February 2024*

- Developed a predictive system to address the high cost of travel bookings by creating a dynamic price prediction model with machine learning to predict booking prices and a dashboard interface using Power BI.

***Tools :*** SVM | KNN | K-Means | Microsoft Power BI | Git.

**Tourism Analysis** *TEK-UP, Ariana | December 2023*

- developed a project by processing a complex database of tourist bookings using R. It included reading the database, manipulating the data, visualizing the data, Creating interactive dashboards and writing a report.

***Tools :*** R | R Markdown | Shiny | Tidyverse | Git.

### Skills

**Programming Languages:** Python | R | Matlab | SQL | JavaScript | Java | C | C++.

**Technologies:** MySQL | MongoDB | Cassandra | ML | DL | LLMs | Fine Tuning | Power BI | Scikit-learn | TensorFlow | Keras | PyTorch | Apache Spark | Apache Airflow | JAX | Hadoop | AWS | Git.

### Languages

**Arabic:** Native **English:** Fluent **French:** Fluent
